items.headline: Fable 5's proactive loop argues for token ceilings
items.body: Willison documented Fable 5 spending $12 on a single CSS scrollbar — spinning up Python servers and rewriting templates unprompted until it found a fix. the portfolio agent system is turn-limited but not token-limited; a model upgrade to Fable could silently multiply costs without triggering the turn cap. adding a per-run token ceiling alongside the existing 8-turn limit would close that gap.
